message:
feat(rchd): Add E2E full build pipeline tests (12 tests)

Add comprehensive E2E test suite for the full build pipeline:

Core tests (8):
- test_cargo_build_release: Happy path build flow
- test_cargo_test: Test command handling
- test_incremental_build: Incremental build support
- test_build_failure: Error handling for compile failures
- test_rchignore_handling: .rchignore file respect
- test_large_project: Large project handling (50+ files)
- test_symlink_handling: Symlink support
- test_parallel_builds: Concurrent build safety

Edge case tests (4):
- test_interrupted_transfer: Transfer error recovery
- test_worker_crash_handling: Worker failure handling
- test_concurrent_same_project: Same-project concurrency
- test_graceful_degradation: Worker unavailability handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
